iti78:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti78:2.1: “Monks, it’s in accordance with their properties that beings come together & associate with one another.
iti78:2.2: Beings of low dispositions come together & associate with beings of low dispositions.
iti78:2.3: Beings of admirable dispositions come together & associate with beings of admirable dispositions.
iti78:3.1: In the past, it was in accordance with their properties that beings came together & associated with one another.…
iti78:4.1:
In the future, it will be in accordance with their properties
that beings will come together & associate with one another.…
iti78:5.1: And now at present, it’s in accordance with their properties that beings come together & associate with one another.
iti78:5.2: Beings of low dispositions come together & associate with beings of low dispositions.
iti78:5.3: Beings of admirable dispositions come together & associate with beings of admirable dispositions.”
iti78:6.3: Just as one riding a small wooden plank
iti78:6.4: would sink in the great sea,
iti78:7.1: so does even one of right living
